fn process_request(request: &Request) -> Response {
    // BAD: env var parsed and converted on every request
    let max_retries: u32 = std::env::var("MAX_RETRIES")
        .unwrap_or_else(|_| "3".into())
        .parse()
        .unwrap_or(3);

    let timeout_ms: u64 = std::env::var("TIMEOUT_MS")
        .unwrap_or_else(|_| "5000".into())
        .parse()
        .unwrap_or(5000);

    let batch_size: usize = std::env::var("BATCH_SIZE")
        .unwrap_or_else(|_| "100".into())
        .parse()
        .unwrap_or(100);

    for batch in request.items.chunks(batch_size) {
        for _ in 0..max_retries {
            if process_batch(batch, timeout_ms).is_ok() {
                break;
            }
        }
    }

    Response::ok()
}
